metadata.title:
Big Fight in City Council Slated for To.
night May Go Oue~ to Special Meet.
ing---Dr Byrne's Diews On Report

pages.raw_text:
The water meter gang is on the
run-so much so that N. w. Durham
and his fellow conspirators are
straining every nerve to save the
water commission report piecemeal
In order to tack on the water meter
proposition later-after the extrava-
gances of the commission plans have
been carried out.


The water meter gang took fright
at the great number of property own
ers and taxpayers who were to be
council tonight to consider the COM
mission report. Last night the gang
got together and decided to work for
a postponement of the consideration
of the commission report until a
special meeting could be called.


The first plans of the water meter
gang were to have the Lidgerwood
protests and the report of City Engi-
neer Gill presented to the council,
then secure a continuance of the mat
ter so as to take away the sting of
the protests and minimize the dam
ger of the city engineers expose of
the weaknesses and extravagances of
the water commissions report. So,
too, they expect to have other engin-
GERS here to help Otto Weile through
his difficult task of explaining de-
fects to be pointed out.


AS the defenders of the consumers
who are threatened with the con-
spiracy of the water enter gang are
In favor of devoting a special meet
ing to the consideration of the re-
port and the protests, it is likely this
will be done.


Many of the persons interested
would like to have the meeting called
during the day in order to give plenty
of time to the discussion. propo-
sition of this kind will be made to-
night.


There Is no chance now for the
council acting on the report tonight
